## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` is clean
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` is clean
- [ ] UI (if touched): `npm --prefix crates/pass-tauri/ui test` passes
- [ ] No secrets, real passwords, or `otpauth://` URIs in the diff, tests, or screenshots
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
